description:
Implement the Staff Edit page at /staff/[id]/edit. Currently this file exists but is completely empty — shows blank.

## Requirements

### Page (`src/app/staff/[id]/edit/page.tsx`)
- Server component that:
  - Fetches the staff member data by ID using adminClient
  - The staff table has columns like: id, profile_id, role, department, etc.
  - Fetch the associated profile (full_name, email) too
  - Redirects to /login if not authenticated
  - Passes the staff data to the client form
  - Adds breadcrumb: Dashboard / Staff / {staff.name} / Edit

### Client Flow
- Wrap the existing `StaffForm` component with `mode="edit"` and pre-filled staff data
- Read `src/components/staff-form.tsx` to understand what props it accepts
- Follow the same pattern as `/staff/new/page.tsx` but with edit mode
- On successful save: `router.push("/staff")`
- On cancel: `router.push("/staff")`

### Tests
- Test that form renders with pre-filled data
- Test that submit calls PUT endpoint
- Test validation errors
- Test cancel navigates back to staff list

Read `src/components/staff-form.tsx` and `src/app/staff/new/page.tsx` first.

log.action: Task moved to triage — filesystem validation failed
